step.title: Load architecture
step.action: Read docs/planning-artifacts/architecture.md and extract components, APIs, data flows, and trust boundaries.

step.title: Identify attack surfaces
step.action: Map all attack surfaces: external interfaces, data entry points, authentication boundaries, third-party integrations.

step.title: Apply STRIDE per component
step.action: For each component, analyze threats using STRIDE: Spoofing, Tampering, Repudiation, Information Disclosure, Denial of Service, Elevation of Privilege.

step.title: Propose mitigations
step.action: For each identified threat, propose specific mitigations with implementation guidance.

step.title: Document residual risks
step.action: Document residual risks that cannot be fully mitigated, with risk ratings and acceptance rationale.

step.title: Produce threat model
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with threat analysis.
